title: BVGPack [MTR]
description: Pack that adds some trains from Berlin U-bahn
body:
THis pack adds BVG F97 and BVG H from Berlin U-Bahn for [MTR](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) mod versions 3.2.2 and 4.0.0(beta) 

**For 3.2.2 version [NTE](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte) mod required.**

please set 1.2 - 2.0 m/s^2 acceleration for better sounds

This pack also supports labPBR
